problem_description: PDF-corpus evaluation case 2. Using only the papers available through the eval web_search and search_papers tools, identify and investigate all decision-making paradigms that explain body regulation, homeostasis, interoception, active inference, and reinforcement learning in adaptive behavior. Treat the corpus as the complete literature universe: split, merge, and name paradigms according to the evidence in the papers, then carry every discovered paradigm and formulation forward.

warnings: Model node 'homeostatic-regulation:homeostatic-reinforcement-learning-hrl-with-drive-reduction-reward' appears to be the only Model node in this stage's artifact but the graph snapshot does not show it explicitly in the nodes list (only in relations_from_stage). Verify the Model node was written correctly with key 'id' matching the value used in BELONGS_TO and IMPLEMENTS relations.

Parameter node 'interoceptive-active-inference:continuous-free-energy-gradient-descent-with-precision-weighted-prediction-errors:p' (display_name='Prior precision', name='**π_p**') and node '...pi-p' (name='pi_p') appear to be duplicates of the same parameter (prior precision π_p) under the same formulation — one created at researcher stage and one at builder stage. These cannot be safely merged here but should be reviewed to avoid ambiguity.
